president.name: Droupadi Murmu
president.bio: Droupadi Murmu is the current President of India and the country’s first tribal woman President. She was born on 20 June 1958 in Odisha. Before becoming President in 2022, she served as the Governor of Jharkhand and was also involved in Odisha state politics. She is known for her contribution to education, tribal welfare, and social service.

primeMinister.name: Narendra Damodardas Modi
primeMinister.bio: Narendra Modi is the current Prime Minister of India. He was born on 17 September 1950 in Vadnagar, Gujarat. He served as the Chief Minister of Gujarat from 2001 to 2014 before becoming the Prime Minister in 2014. He is a member of the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) and is known for initiatives such as Digital India, Make in India, and Swachh Bharat Abhiyan.
detailedWork: Digital India & Jan Dhan Yojana: Revolutionized digital payments and financial inclusion.
Infrastructure Development: Massive expansion of highways, railways, and airports.
Article 370 & GST: Significant legislative reforms including Unified Tax System.
Atmanirbhar Bharat: Promotion of self-reliance and local manufacturing.

homeMinister.name: Amit Shah
homeMinister.bio: Amit Shah is the current Home Minister of India. He was born on 22 October 1964 in Mumbai, Maharashtra. He is a senior leader of the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) and has played an important role in Indian politics. Before becoming Home Minister in 2019, he served as the President of the BJP. He is known for his work in national security, internal administration, and political strategy.
